overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rainy futuristic city at dusk. The player navigates wet neon-lit streets, enters a parking facility, and drives through commercial districts with heavy traffic and pedestrians carrying umbrellas.

vehicle accelerates forward through the intersection

group with umbrellas crossing the street

tall concrete building with geometric patterns and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rainy urban intersection with the vehicle waiting at a red light. Pedestrians with umbrellas cross in the distance. When the light changes, the vehicle accelerates through the intersection, passing bold yellow crosswalk stripes.

segments.scene_description: Driving under massive concrete overpasses and pedestrian bridges, the street is lined with digital billboards and futuristic architecture. The road remains wet with rain as the vehicle passes through the covered sections of the urban corridor.

entering covered garage area with artificial neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right toward the Delamain facility, passing under the illuminated corporate sign. The environment transitions from open rain to a covered entrance ramp with directional arrow lights, descending into the parking structure.

events.description: exiting indoor parking through tunnel back to outdoor street

segments.scene_description: Driving through the covered parking garage with neon-lit walls, the vehicle approaches the exit tunnel. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to natural daylight as the vehicle emerges back onto the rainy city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with massive digital billboards

yellow striped pedestrian crossing at the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a vibrant commercial district featuring massive digital billboards and glass-fronted buildings. The road is busy with moderate traffic as the vehicle approaches an intersection with yellow crosswalk markings.

events.description: executing right turn at intersection onto new street
merging into traffic flow under building overpass

agents.ego_description: turning right at intersection and continuing down busy avenue with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: black car passing in the adjacent left lane

entered.detail: traffic light showing green for through traffic
street signs and traffic control devices on sidewalk
covered section of road passing under building structure

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the intersection, the vehicle proceeds down a multi-lane avenue passing under building overpasses. The street features moderate traffic density with various vehicles and illuminated street signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated roadway with pedestrian overpass

events.description: following black pickup truck around right curve

yellow safety barriers along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle follows a black pickup truck around a curved section of road, passing under a pedestrian overpass. The road continues through the rainy urban environment with yellow barriers lining the sidewalk and moderate pedestrian activity visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rainy futuristic metropolis, transitioning from open neon-lit intersections into a corporate parking facility and back out into a dense commercial district. It begins at a rainy urban intersection where the vehicle accelerates past yellow crosswalks and glides under massive concrete overpasses lined with digital billboards. The camera then turns toward the Delamain facility, descending from the open rain through an illuminated entrance ramp and into a neon-walled parking garage before emerging back into the daylight of the city streets. As the vehicle enters a vibrant commercial district of glass buildings and heavy traffic, it navigates a series of right turns and multi-lane avenues beneath building overpasses. The journey finally follows a black pickup truck around a curved road, passing under a pedestrian bridge and alongside yellow sidewalk barriers amidst the persistent rain.
